pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property from 1.8 to 11 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce bytecode incompatible with JDK 11 if the source/target levels remain at 1.8.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Framework from 4.x to 5.1.2 to support Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring 4.x does not support Java 11; using it results in runtime errors or missing API support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JUnit from 4.x to 5.3.1 to use JUnit 5 Jupiter engine.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 4 is not compatible with JUnit 5 test runners and annotations; tests will fail to execute.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 dependency with JUnit 5 Jupiter engine artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old junit artifact is not present in JUnit 5; the build will fail to resolve dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Mockito from 1.x to 2.23.0 to support Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mockito 1.x is not compatible with Java 11; it may fail to load or mock classes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated mockito-all with mockito-core.
pom.xml.why_exists: mockito-all is deprecated and removed in newer versions; dependency resolution will fail.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to 3.8.0 to ensure Java 11 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may not correctly handle Java 11 language features or module system.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 2.22.1 to support JUnit 5.
pom.xml.why_exists: Surefire < 2.22.0 does not support JUnit 5; tests will not be discovered or executed.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade AspectJ to 1.9.2 to support Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older AspectJ versions may fail to weave or compile against Java 11 bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-aspectj-plugin to 1.11.1 to support Java 11.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older plugin versions may not correctly invoke AspectJ compiler for Java 11.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade XStream to 1.4.11.1 to fix security vulnerabilities.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older XStream versions have known security flaws; while not strictly a compile error, it's a critical runtime risk often treated as breaking in migrations.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Log4j to 2.11.1 to fix security vulnerabilities.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Log4j versions have known security flaws.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade SLF4J to 1.7.25.
Upgrade Commons Configuration to 2.3.
Upgrade Commons Lang3 to 3.8.1.
Upgrade Joda-Time to 2.10.1.
Upgrade Jopt-Simple to 5.0.4.
Upgrade ActiveMQ to 5.15.7.
Add JMS API 2.0.1 dependency.
Restructure POM from single module to parent POM with modules.
Move dependencies to dependencyManagement section.
Add Maven Enforcer plugin to enforce Java and Maven versions.
Update SCM URLs to point to new repository.
Add distribution management for Sonatype Nexus.
Add repository definitions for Sonatype snapshots.
Update developer information and organization details.
